final_message:
All checks pass. Summary of what was produced:

**`summary.json`** (computed from `data/sales.csv`, 30 data rows):
- `total_revenue`: 7154.44
- `orders`: 30
- `median_order_value`: 204.94 — edge case: even count (30), so it's the mean of the 15th and 16th sorted order values ($190.00 and $219.89) = 204.945, which is 204.9449… in IEEE-754 and rounds to 204.94
- `top_product_by_revenue`: "Gadget" ($2,392.00, 33.4% of total — 1.13× the runner-up Widget's $2,118.94)
- `revenue_by_region`: all 4 regions present in the data (North 2176.35, East 1830.79, South 1732.48, West 1414.82); the four values sum to exactly 7154.44, matching `total_revenue`

**`REPORT.md`** (verified mechanically):
- Exactly four H2 headings in the required order and spelling, no other headings (grep confirmed)
- 115 words total, under the 250 cap
- Overview states `$7,154.44` in the exact required format and the 30-order count
- Exactly 3 `- ` bullets in Recommendations, at 12/11/12 words each (all ≤ 25)
- Zero occurrences of the five banned words (case-insensitive grep confirmed)

The report's percentages are computed ratios (e.g., Gadget 2392.00/7154.44 = 33.4%; West trails North by 35.0%), and each recommendation ties to a specific figure. No git commits were made.
